mcp.instructions: Internal Developer Platform MCP server (v3). 25 tools: Azure subscriptions, Resource Graph queries, Advisor recommendations, Policy compliance, GitHub repos/issues/PRs/actions/code-search/labels, knowledge base search, and campaign management. New: list_repositories, get_pull_requests, get_workflow_failures, search_code, get_repo_stats, close_or_reopen_issue, add_label.
